title: Token usage progress bar component with color coding
purpose: Displays a visual progress bar showing current token usage relative to maximum capacity, with color changes based on usage percentage.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ContextMeter that accepts used and max token counts as props.

steps.content: Calculate a safe maximum value to prevent division by zero.
Determine the usage ratio clamped between 0 and 1.
Convert the ratio to a percentage value.
Select the appropriate color class based on the percentage threshold.
Render the progress bar with the calculated width and color.
Display the token usage count and percentage below the bar.
